target.field_a: Mechanobiology (extracellular matrix mechanics) — ECM stiffness, viscoelasticity, fiber architecture, integrins, focal adhesions, cytoskeleton, YAP/TAZ, MRTF, Piezo channels
target.field_c: Epigenomics (genomic enhancer regulation) — distal enhancer elements, 3D chromatin looping, H3K27ac, H3K4me1, mediator complex, phase-separated transcriptional condensates

disjointness_evidence: Landmark paper Cosgrove 2025 (Science) defines mechanoenhancers genome-wide using ATAC-seq+CRISPRi. ECM stiffness → 3D genome (TAD level) shown by Li 2024 Hi-C. Viscoelastic ECM → cis-regulatory element accessibility shown by Zhang 2025 (Nat Commun). YAP/TAZ enhancer binding well-established in oncology. ECM mechanics → KDM histone demethylase activity shown by Tayler 2026. Key gaps remain: H3K27ac/H3K4me1 ChIP at mechanoenhancers, E-P loop dynamics at mechanoenhancer resolution, condensate assembly as ECM stiffness function, MRTF enhancer binding landscape.
disjointness_implication: Do NOT rehash mechanoenhancer existence (Cosgrove 2025 covered this). Generator should focus on unresolved mechanisms: (1) H3K27ac/H3K4me1 histone mark dynamics at mechanoenhancers, (2) phase-separated condensate assembly as mechanical input function, (3) looping-independent E-P contact mechanism (86.2% of connections lack loops), (4) Piezo1→HAT→H3K27ac enhancer circuit, (5) MRTF genome-wide enhancer binding under force.

papers_retrieved.title: Mechanosensitive genomic enhancers potentiate the cellular response to matrix stiffness
papers_retrieved.authors: Cosgrove BD, Bounds LR, Taylor CK, Su AL, Rizzo AJ, Barrera A, Crawford GE, Hoffman BD, Gersbach CA
papers_retrieved.significance: LANDMARK: First genome-wide identification of mechanoenhancers using ATAC-seq+CRISPRi. Stiff/soft ECM activate distinct enhancer programs (TEAD/AP-1/SRF vs RUNX1/FOXF1). Critical finding: only 13.8% of E-P connections have annotated chromatin loops. Chromatin accessibility changes within 1h of contractile perturbation. Validated in IPF patient fibroblasts.

papers_retrieved.title: Viscoelastic extracellular matrix enhances epigenetic remodeling and cellular plasticity
papers_retrieved.significance: Viscoelastic (slow-relaxing) ECM reduces lamin A/C, increases nuclear size, decreases chromatin compaction, increases chromatin accessibility at cis-regulatory elements. Global euchromatin mark increase. Improves fibroblast-to-neuron and iPSC reprogramming.
papers_retrieved.gap: Cis-regulatory elements opened are not specifically characterized as enhancers; H3K27ac/H3K4me1 not mapped

papers_retrieved.title: Stiff extracellular matrix drives the differentiation of mesenchymal stem cells toward osteogenesis by the multiscale 3D genome reorganization
papers_retrieved.significance: Hi-C in MSCs: stiff ECM drives more long-range interactions, compartment B→A switching at cytoskeletal genes, TAD merging around osteogenic TFs (SP1, ETS1). First direct Hi-C evidence that ECM stiffness reorganizes 3D genome architecture.
papers_retrieved.gap: TAD-level only; no enhancer-promoter loop resolution; no histone mark mapping

papers_retrieved.title: Transcriptional addiction in cancer cells is mediated by YAP/TAZ through BRD4
papers_retrieved.authors: Zanconato F, Piccolo S et al.
papers_retrieved.significance: YAP/TAZ form phase-separated condensates with BRD4, MED1, CDK9 at super-enhancers. TAZ condensates at TEAD4-marked super-enhancers concentrate transcriptional machinery. Condensate dissolution reverses chromatin topological changes within 4h. 269 citations — foundational.
papers_retrieved.gap: Cancer context on rigid plastic; stiffness-dependent condensate assembly at specific mechanoenhancers not studied

papers_retrieved.title: Liquid Nuclear Condensates Mechanically Sense and Restructure the Genome
papers_retrieved.authors: Shin Y, Brangwynne CP et al.
papers_retrieved.significance: Phase-separated condensates preferentially nucleate in euchromatic (softer) regions via lower mechanical energy cost. Condensates mechanically exclude heterochromatin. Surface tension-driven coalescence can pull targeted loci together without chromatin looping.
papers_retrieved.bridge_potential: Provides mechanism for looping-independent E-P regulation at mechanoenhancers — condensates co-localize multiple mechanoenhancers by phase separation physics

papers_retrieved.title: Pulsatile flow induces chromatin interaction with lamin-associated proteins to enrich H3K9 methylation in endothelial cells
papers_retrieved.authors: Chen LJ, Shyy JYJ, Chien S et al.
papers_retrieved.significance: First direct mechanosensitive histone mark ChIP-seq: shear flow → H3K9me3 at lamin-associated chromatin. Demonstrates mechanical force deposits specific histone marks. Repressive mark — establishes bimodal epigenomic response to force.
papers_retrieved.gap: H3K9me3 (repressive); H3K27ac (activating enhancer mark) at mechanoenhancers still unmapped

papers_retrieved.title: Matrix stiffness and stress relaxation regulate osteogenesis through histone demethylases KDM4B and KDM6B
papers_retrieved.authors: Tayler IM, Stowers RS et al.
papers_retrieved.significance: ECM stiffness and stress relaxation directly regulate KDM4B (H3K9me3 demethylase) and KDM6B (H3K27me3 demethylase) activity. KDM6B removes Polycomb repression — prerequisite for enhancer activation. Creates direct ECM mechanics → epigenetic enzyme → histone mark chain.
papers_retrieved.gap: Studied at gene promoters/bodies; enhancer-specific KDM6B activity at mechanoenhancers not characterized

papers_retrieved.title: The Force is Strong with This Epigenome: Chromatin Structure and Mechanobiology
papers_retrieved.authors: Hsia CR, Melters DP, Dalal Y
papers_retrieved.significance: Comprehensive 193-reference review. Establishes bidirectional mechanical feedback between chromatin and ECM. Confirms as of 2023 that enhancer-specific mechanosensing was 'largely unmapped'.

papers_retrieved.title: YAP/TAZ-VGLL3 governs adipocyte fate via epigenetic reprogramming of PPARgamma and its target enhancers
papers_retrieved.authors: Seol T, Lim DS et al.
papers_retrieved.significance: YAP/TAZ have direct, named-enhancer-specific effects: maintain H3K27me3 at PPARg enhancers; VGLL3 displacement switches to H3K27ac activation. Shows YAP/TAZ directly control enhancer histone mark balance.

papers_retrieved.title: Compressive stress-driven Piezo1 activation and Rho-ROCK mechanotransduction promote tumor progression via epigenetic mechanical memory
papers_retrieved.significance: Piezo1 compressive stress → Rho-ROCK → H3K acetylation → open chromatin → cancer gene expression. Epigenetic mechanical memory (imprint persists after force removal). Parallel study: Piezo1 → F-actin → YAP nuclear localization.
papers_retrieved.gap: H3K acetylation bulk; specific HAT and enhancer targeting not identified

yap_taz_enhancer_binding.evidence: YAP/TAZ bind primarily to TEAD-occupied distal enhancers genome-wide (>90% of targets). H3K27ac marks at YAP-bound loci. TEAD motifs enriched at stiff-ECM mechanoenhancers (Cosgrove 2025). YAP/TAZ-BRD4 condensates at super-enhancers (Zanconato 2018).
yap_taz_enhancer_binding.gap: YAP ChIP-seq not performed under ECM stiffness gradients; mostly cancer cells on rigid plastic

mrtf_srf_enhancer_binding.evidence: MRTF nuclear translocation is actin/stiffness-dependent. SRF/CaRG motifs at MYH9 mechanoenhancer (Cosgrove 2025). Nuclear actin associates with chromatin remodeling complexes.
mrtf_srf_enhancer_binding.gap: No genome-wide MRTF ChIP-seq under ECM stiffness conditions; enhancer vs promoter preference unmapped

ecm_stiffness_3d_genome.evidence: Li 2024 Hi-C: TAD merging and compartment switching with ECM stiffness in MSCs. Cosgrove 2025 Micro-C: only 13.8% E-P connections have loops at mechanoenhancers.
ecm_stiffness_3d_genome.gap: No E-P loop resolution Micro-C data at specific mechanoenhancers across stiffness gradient

condensate_mechanical_response.evidence: Shin 2018: condensates sense chromatin stiffness. Zanconato 2018: YAP-BRD4 condensates at super-enhancers. pH-condensate dissolution (Cell 2025).
condensate_mechanical_response.gap: No direct study of ECM stiffness gradient → YAP-BRD4 condensate assembly/dissolution at specific mechanoenhancers

piezo1_histone_enhancer.evidence: Piezo1 → Rho-ROCK → H3K acetylation (Sci Adv 2025). Piezo1 → YAP nuclear (ACS AMI 2025). Ca2+ → nuclear signaling cascades.
piezo1_histone_enhancer.gap: No direct Piezo1 → p300/CBP → H3K27ac at enhancers circuit established

h3k27ac_h3k4me1_mechanoenhancer.evidence: H3K27ac/H3K4me1 ChIP-seq at mechanoenhancers under ECM stiffness: NOT PERFORMED ANYWHERE. NAR Cancer 2025 shows H3K27ac at promoters (not enhancers) on soft ECM.
h3k27ac_h3k4me1_mechanoenhancer.gap: THIS IS THE PRIMARY UNEXPLORED MECHANISTIC GAP — canonical enhancer histone marks at mechanoenhancers never mapped

ecm_stiffness_ep_loops.evidence: TAD-level 3D genome changes with stiffness exist (Li 2024). Only 13.8% of mechanoenhancer-gene connections have chromatin loops (Cosgrove 2025).
ecm_stiffness_ep_loops.gap: Specific enhancer-promoter loop formation/disruption as function of ECM stiffness not measured

gap_analysis.label: Mechanoenhancer histone code
gap_analysis.description: H3K27ac and H3K4me1 ChIP-seq at mechanoenhancers under ECM stiffness gradients
gap_analysis.what_exists: ATAC-seq chromatin accessibility at mechanoenhancers (Cosgrove 2025); H3K27ac at promoters on soft ECM (NAR Cancer 2025); KDM6B H3K27me3 demethylase controlled by ECM stiffness (Tayler 2026)
gap_analysis.what_missing: ChIP-seq for canonical active enhancer marks (H3K27ac, H3K4me1) at specific mechanoenhancers under stiffness gradients; kinetics of H3K27ac deposition/removal at mechanoenhancers with stiffness change
gap_analysis.hypothesis_seed: ECM stiffness encodes H3K27ac at stiff-ECM mechanoenhancers via YAP-p300 co-recruitment, with KDM6B-mediated H3K27me3 erasure as prerequisite; soft ECM maintains H3K27me3 at these same loci via YAP nuclear exclusion and Polycomb maintenance

gap_analysis.label: Looping-independent E-P contact mechanism at mechanoenhancers
gap_analysis.description: How do 86.2% of mechanoenhancers regulate gene expression without chromatin loops?
gap_analysis.what_exists: 13.8% E-P connections have loops (Cosgrove 2025 Micro-C); phase-separated condensates can pull loci together without looping (Shin 2018); YAP-BRD4 condensates at super-enhancers (Zanconato 2018)
gap_analysis.what_missing: Direct evidence that condensate-mediated multi-enhancer co-localization (not looping) is the dominant mechanism at mechanoenhancers; high-resolution imaging of YAP condensates at mechanoenhancer clusters
gap_analysis.hypothesis_seed: YAP phase-separated nuclear condensates physically co-localize multiple non-looped mechanoenhancers in 3D nuclear space via condensate surface tension (Shin 2018 mechanism), creating transcriptional hubs that act collectively — explaining the 86.2% looping-independent regulation

gap_analysis.label: ECM stiffness → condensate assembly at mechanoenhancers
gap_analysis.description: Does ECM stiffness gradient control YAP-BRD4 condensate number/size at specific mechanoenhancers?
gap_analysis.what_exists: YAP-BRD4 condensates at super-enhancers in cancer (Zanconato 2018); YAP nuclear entry is stiffness-dependent; condensate dissolution reverses chromatin topology within 4h
gap_analysis.what_missing: Quantitative relationship between ECM stiffness and YAP-BRD4 condensate assembly at specific mechanoenhancer loci; whether condensates are absent on soft ECM at these loci
gap_analysis.hypothesis_seed: ECM stiffness gradient is encoded as analog YAP nuclear concentration, which proportionally drives BRD4-MED1 condensate assembly at mechanoenhancers — creating a mechanical rheostat that continuously tunes super-enhancer output proportional to ECM stiffness

gap_analysis.label: MRTF genome-wide enhancer binding under mechanical force
gap_analysis.description: Does MRTF-SRF preferentially bind mechanoenhancers vs promoters on stiff ECM?
gap_analysis.what_exists: MRTF nuclear translocation with actin/stiffness; SRF/CaRG motifs at MYH9 mechanoenhancer; nuclear actin in chromatin remodeling complexes
gap_analysis.what_missing: Genome-wide MRTF ChIP-seq on soft vs stiff hydrogels; proportion of MRTF targets that are enhancers vs promoters under mechanical conditions
gap_analysis.hypothesis_seed: MRTF preferentially occupies mechanoenhancers (over promoters) on stiff ECM by exploiting the open chromatin created by the YAP/p300 mechanoepigenetic cascade, driving a cytoskeletal gene program that reinforces ECM stiffness sensing in a feed-forward loop

gap_analysis.label: Piezo1 → p300/CBP → H3K27ac at mechanoenhancers
gap_analysis.description: Does Piezo1 Ca2+ activate p300/CBP to deposit H3K27ac specifically at mechanoenhancers?
gap_analysis.what_exists: Piezo1 → Rho-ROCK → H3K acetylation (bulk; Sci Adv 2025); Piezo1 → F-actin → YAP nuclear; p300/CBP are H3K27ac writers recruited by YAP at enhancers
gap_analysis.what_missing: Specific HAT (p300 vs CBP) downstream of Piezo1; enhancer-specific H3K27ac deposition at mechanoenhancers; kinetics faster than YAP translocation?
gap_analysis.hypothesis_seed: Piezo1 Ca2+ → CaM-CAMKII → p300 HAT activation → H3K27ac at stiff-ECM mechanoenhancers within 15 minutes of mechanical stimulation — providing a rapid pre-priming mechanism before YAP nuclear entry (30-60 min), establishing a two-phase mechanoenhancer activation: Piezo1-fast priming then YAP-dependent amplification

gap_analysis.label: Nuclear deformation → specific E-P loop restructuring
gap_analysis.description: Does nuclear deformation magnitude causally restructure specific E-P loops at mechanoenhancers?
gap_analysis.what_exists: Nuclear confinement/deformation alters chromatin organization generally; lamin A/C level determines nuclear stiffness; LINC complex transmits cytoskeletal forces
gap_analysis.what_missing: Quantitative causal link between nuclear strain magnitude and specific chromatin loop changes at mechanoenhancers; whether lamin A/C level determines which mechanoenhancers respond to nuclear deformation
gap_analysis.hypothesis_seed: Threshold nuclear strain (set by lamin A/C level) irreversibly shifts specific mechanoenhancer-gene contact topology, encoding a mechanical history in the 3D genome that persists as epigenetic mechanical memory

ecm_stiffness_alters_ep_loop_formation.detail: TAD merging and compartment changes with stiffness shown (Li 2024 Hi-C). But E-P loop formation at specific mechanoenhancers not studied. Cosgrove 2025 shows only 13.8% of mechanoenhancer-gene connections have loops, suggesting looping-independent mechanism dominates.

yap_taz_mrtf_bind_specific_enhancers.answer: YES for YAP/TAZ; PARTIAL for MRTF
yap_taz_mrtf_bind_specific_enhancers.detail: YAP/TAZ bind TEAD distal enhancers genome-wide (well-established). MRTF: SRF/CaRG motifs at MYH9 mechanoenhancer shown; no genome-wide MRTF ChIP-seq under ECM stiffness conditions.

nuclear_deformation_alters_3d_chromatin_.detail: General nuclear mechanics → chromatin organization established. Specific mechanoenhancer E-P loop changes from nuclear deformation not mapped.

mechanosensitive_histone_mods_at_enhance.detail: H3K9me3 at lamin-associated heterochromatin from shear force shown (Chen 2025 PNAS). H3K27ac at promoters from soft ECM shown (NAR Cancer 2025). H3K27ac/H3K4me1 specifically at mechanoenhancers under stiffness gradients: NOT DONE.

phase_separated_condensates_respond_to_m.detail: Condensates sense chromatin stiffness (Shin 2018). YAP-BRD4 condensates at super-enhancers (Zanconato 2018, cancer context). No direct ECM stiffness → condensate formation/dissolution at mechanoenhancers studied.
